sys_script_include.description: Methods to provide permission checks for UI Actions related to Mark Inactive business rules. 2.8.3 | 2023-06-06 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing)
sys_script_include.name: MarkInactiveConditionalMethods
